creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Security update to version 2.11.1.1

See http://www.phpmyadmin.net/home_page/security.php?issue=PMASA-2007-5
    http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/26020/info

for details.

This fixes a cross-site scripting attack against IE with the 'send
URLs as UTF8' optin turned off.
